series.title: Prinzessin Lillifee (Kinofilme)

albums.title: Das kleine Einhorn (Original Hörspiel zum Kinofilm)

series.curator_notes: Split from Prinzessin Lillifee. These are full movie audiobooks (Hörspiel zum Kinofilm) - 'Prinzessin Lillifee' (2009) and 'Das kleine Einhorn' (2011). They are 43-track feature-length audiobooks, not episodic content. Parents would expect these as separate movie entries, not mixed with episodic series.
